description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image and defines the stages build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs apt update, installs cmake, gfortran (via update-alternatives), libblas-dev, liblapack-dev, doxygen, lcov, python and python‑pip, then pip installs gcovr, creates a build directory, runs cmake ../ -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DBUILD_DOC=True && make, and publishes the build/, src/ and uni10_api_test/ directories as artifacts. In the test stage add a test job that repeats the same before‑script commands, depends on the build job, changes into the build directory and executes cd uni10_api_test && ./runUni10Tests, and stores the build/ directory as an artifact. Add a pages job that depends on build, copies build/doc/html to a public folder and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Finally, in the deploy stage add a deploy_pypi job that runs only on tags, runs apt update, installs cmake, python, python‑pip, libblas-dev, liblapack-dev, pip installs pybind11 and twine, builds a source distribution with python setup.py sdist, echoes the $TWINE_USERNAME and $TWINE_PASSWORD variables, and uploads the package to PyPI with twine upload dist/*.
